goal: One-shot PNG capture from /World/amr/rear_fisheye at configured 1920x1080, headless-compatible.
thoughts: capture_camera_image targets the named prim — does NOT fall back to viewport camera. Headless-safe (no UI render). If image is white: either auto-exposure maxed or camera inside a mesh — check inspect_camera first. Depth from same prim at same instant needs a second capture call with output_type=depth.
code:
inspect_camera(prim_path="/World/amr/rear_fisheye")
# Sanity: HFOV 180, resolution 1920x1080, not occluded by parent mesh.

capture_camera_image(
    camera_prim="/World/amr/rear_fisheye",
    output_path="/tmp/rear_fisheye_check.png",
    resolution=[1920, 1080],
    output_type="rgb",
    wait_for_render=True                          # avoid black frame
)

# Report: sim time of capture (frame tick), path written.
# If paired depth wanted, second call with output_type="depth".
failure_modes: Capturing from viewport instead of the named prim
Black PNG — wait_for_render not set, renderer not warmed
White PNG — auto-exposure or camera inside parent mesh
Resolution arg ignored because camera was configured at different size
